data.title: Income & Growth VCT Director Increases Shareholding
data.description:
Income & Growth VCT plc Class S (GB:IGV) has released an update.

Income & Growth VCT plc has announced that Justin Ward, a Non-Executive Director, and his spouse, Elizabeth Ward, have purchased additional shares through the Dividend Investment Scheme. The transactions, conducted on the London Stock Exchange, bring Justin Ward’s total shareholding to 106,623 ordinary shares, representing 0.04% of the company’s issued share capital. This move indicates continued confidence in the company’s growth potential by its leadership.

For further insights into GB:IGV stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: The Gym Group Launches 2024 Employee Share Scheme
data.description:
The Gym (GB:GYM) has released an update.

The Gym Group has launched its 2024 Save As You Earn Scheme, allowing eligible employees to purchase company shares at a fixed price of £1.28 each. With 67 employees participating, options for a total of 166,486 shares, representing 0.09% of the company’s share capital, have been granted. This initiative reflects the company’s commitment to employee investment and growth.

For further insights into GB:GYM stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: China Baoli Technologies Boosts Shareholder Stake with New Issuance
data.description:
China Baoli Technologies Holdings Ltd. (HK:0164) has released an update.

China Baoli Technologies Holdings Ltd. has completed the issuance of 9,756,096 new shares at HK$0.41 each, raising approximately HK$1.9 million after expenses. The new shares have significantly increased the First Subscriber’s stake from 0.7646% to 4.7908%. The company aims to use the proceeds for designated purposes as outlined in their previous announcement.

For further insights into HK:0164 stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Namibia Critical Metals Advances Lofdal Project
data.description:
Namibia Critical Metals Inc (TSE:NMI) has released an update.

Namibia Critical Metals Inc. has secured the renewal of its Environmental Clearance Certificate for the Lofdal Heavy Rare Earth Project, enabling continued exploration and mining activities. The company is advancing its Pre-Feasibility Study with new sorting technologies and sustainable power options, aiming for completion by Q1 2025. These developments highlight the company’s commitment to sustainable mining and leveraging technology to enhance resource efficiency.

For further insights into TSE:NMI stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Hepsiburada Shares Sold to Kaspi.kz, Aims for Continued Growth
data.description:
D-Market (HEPS) has released an update.

Hepsiburada’s founder and affiliates have agreed to sell all their Class A and B shares to Kazakhstan’s Joint Stock Company Kaspi.kz, signaling a potential change in control of the Turkish e-commerce platform. Despite this significant transaction, Hepsiburada plans to continue operating under its current brand. Investors are advised to stay informed as the deal awaits regulatory approvals.

For further insights into HEPS stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Atmus Filtration Announces Dividend and Q3 Results Date
data.description:
An announcement from Atmus Filtration Technologies, Inc. ( (ATMU) ) is now available.

Atmus Filtration Technologies Inc. has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.05 per share, payable on November 13, 2024. The company will release its third-quarter 2024 financial results on November 8, followed by a conference call to discuss its performance. As a global leader in filtration solutions, Atmus continues to innovate and serve diverse industries worldwide.

data.title: Empiric Directors Boost Stake in Student Property Firm
data.description:
Empiric Student Property (GB:ESP) has released an update.

Empiric Student Property plc, a leading provider of premium student accommodation, announced that several of its directors, including the CEO and CFO, have increased their shareholdings in the company. This move is seen as a vote of confidence in Empiric’s future prospects, aligning its leadership with shareholder interests. The transactions were conducted on the London Stock Exchange.

data.title: Sunway International Delays Key Financial Document Dispatch
data.description:
Sunway International Holdings Limited (HK:0058) has released an update.

Sunway International Holdings Limited has announced a delay in the dispatch of key documents related to a connected transaction involving proposed share subscription and convertible bonds issuance. The delay pertains to a circular and a composite document that were initially scheduled for release earlier in October 2024, now expected by the end of the month. This development may impact investors tracking the company’s share transactions and potential offers.

data.title: Scana’s Strategic Entry into Swedish Energy Market
data.description:
Scana ASA (DE:1MP) has released an update.

Scana’s subsidiary, PSW Power & Automation, has secured a significant frame agreement with a Swedish energy company to deliver Battery Energy Storage Systems, marking a strategic entry into the Swedish market. This agreement, starting in Q4 2024, spans two years with potential extensions, highlighting the growing demand for energy storage solutions amid the energy transition.

data.title: Masimo Expands Board with New Director Appointments
data.description:
Masimo ( (MASI) ) has shared an announcement.

Masimo Corporation has expanded its Board of Directors to include Timothy J. Scannell and Wendy E. Lane, bringing expertise in medical technology and corporate governance. Scannell, with a strong leadership background at Stryker Corporation, and Lane, with extensive board experience, are set to contribute significantly to Masimo’s growth strategy. Both will receive annual compensation and restricted stock units, aligning their interests with those of the company’s stakeholders.
